sentences.arabic: أَرَدْتُ أَنْ أُبَدِّلَ بَعْضَ الْيُورُوهَاتِ إِلَى الْجُنَيْهِ الْمِصْرِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Htio sam zamijeniti nekoliko eura u egipatske funte.
sentences.translationEn: I wanted to exchange some euros into Egyptian pounds.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَكْتَبِ الصَّرَّافَةِ فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam u mjenjačnicu u centru grada.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the currency exchange office in the city centre.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلْتُ عَنْ سِعْرِ صَرْفِ الْيُورُو الْيَوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Pitao sam koji je danas kurs eura.
sentences.translationEn: I asked what the euro exchange rate was today.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَانِي الصَّرَّافُ السِّعْرَ الْحَالِيَّ وَعَدَّ لِيَ الْمَبْلَغَ بِعِنَايَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Mjenjač mi je dao trenutni kurs i pažljivo izbrojao iznos.
sentences.translationEn: The cashier gave me the current rate and carefully counted out the amount.

sentences.arabic: أَخَذْتُ الْمَالَ وَشَكَرْتُهُ قَبْلَ أَنْ أَغَادِرَ.
sentences.translation: Uzeo sam novac i zahvalio mu se prije nego što sam otišao.
sentences.translationEn: I took the money and thanked him before leaving.
